translations.en: I have a heart condition, sorry.
translations.es: Tengo un problema del corazón, lo siento.
translations.de: Ich habe eine Herzkrankheit, tut mir leid.
translations.yue: 我有心臟問題，唔好意思。
translations.vi: Tôi bị bệnh tim, xin lỗi.
translations.hi: मुझे हृदय रोग है, माफ़ कीजिए.
translations.ro: Am o afecțiune cardiacă, îmi pare rău.
translations.ja: 私は心臓の病気があって、すみません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (présent de l’indicatif, 1sg) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective functioning as a subject complement (avoir une maladie du cœur).
Interjectional use of the adjective to express apology; parenthetical, not integrated into the copular clause.

translations.en: He has had a heart condition since birth.
translations.es: Él nació con un problema del corazón.
translations.de: Er hat seit der Geburt eine Herzkrankheit.
translations.it: Lui è nato con una cardiopatia.
translations.ko: 그는 태어날 때부터 심장 질환이 있습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他从出生起就有心脏病。
translations.yue: 佢一出世就有心臟問題。
translations.pt: Ele nasceu com uma doença cardíaca.
translations.vi: Anh ấy sinh ra đã bị bệnh tim.
translations.ar: وُلِد והוא مصاب بمرض في القلب.
translations.nl: Hij is geboren met een hartafwijking.
translations.hi: वह जन्म से हृदय रोग से पीड़ित है.
translations.pl: On urodził się z chorobą serca.
translations.nb: Han er født med en hjertelidelse.
translations.ro: El s-a născut cu o afecțiune cardiacă.
translations.da: Han er født με en hjertesygdom.
translations.ja: 彼は生まれつき心臓の病気があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person masculine singular.
Copular auxiliary (présent de l’indicatif, 3sg) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective serving as subject complement.
Preposition introducing the nominal complement ‘naissance’ (fixed phrase ‘de naissance’ = ‘by birth’).
Noun head of the prepositional complement; completes the idiomatic expression ‘de naissance’.

translations.en: She has a heart condition and is fragile.
translations.es: Ella tiene un problema del corazón y es frágil.
translations.de: Sie hat eine Herzkrankheit und ist schwach.
translations.it: Lei ha una cardiopatia ed è fragile.
translations.ko: 그녀는 심장 질환이 있고 몸이 약합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她有心脏病，身体很脆弱。
translations.yue: 佢有心臟問題，而且好虛弱。
translations.ru: У неё сердечное заболевание, и она хрупкая.
translations.pt: Ela tem uma doença cardíaca και é frágil.
translations.he: יש לה בעיה בלב והיא שברירית.
translations.tr: Onun kalp rahatsızlığı var ve narin.
translations.vi: Cô ấy bị bệnh tim và sức khỏe mong manh.
translations.ar: هي مصابة بمرض في القلب وهي ضعيفة.
translations.nl: Zij heeft μια hartkwaal en is kwetsbaar.
translations.uk: У неї хвороба серця, і вона крихка.
translations.hi: वह हृदय रोग से पीड़ित है और नाज़ुक है.
translations.pl: Ona ma chorobę serca i jest krucha.
translations.nb: Hun har en hjertelidelse og er skjør.
translations.id: Dia menderita penyakit jantung dan kondisinya rapuh.
translations.sv: Hon har en hjärtsjukdom και är skör.
translations.ro: Ea are o afecțiune cardiacă și este fragilă.
translations.cs: Ona má srdeční onemocnění a je křehká.
translations.da: Hun har en hjertesygdom og er skrøbelig.
translations.fi: Hänellä on sydänsairaus ja hän on hauras.
translations.ja: 彼女は心臓の病気があり、体が弱いです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person feminine singular.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the coordinated predicate adjectives.
Predicate adjective; first conjunct in a coordination of adjectives.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicate adjectives.
Predicate adjective; second conjunct in the coordinated predicate complement.

translations.en: My father doesn't have a heart condition.
translations.es: Mi padre no tiene un problema del corazón.
translations.it: Mio padre non ha una cardiopatia.
translations.ru: У моего отца нет сердечного заболевания.
translations.pt: Meu pai não tem doença cardíaca.
translations.vi: Cha tôi không bị bệnh tim.
translations.ar: أبي ليس لديه مرض في القلب.
translations.uk: У мого батька немає хвороби серця.
translations.hi: मेरे पिता को हृदय रोग नहीं है.
translations.pl: Mój ojciec nie ma choroby serca.
translations.el: Ο πατέρας μου δεν έχει καρδιοπάθεια.
translations.id: Ayah saya tidak memiliki penyakit jantung.
translations.ro: Tatăl meu nu are afecțiune cardiacă.
translations.ja: 父には心臓の病気はありません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), agreeing in gender/number with ‘père’; modifies the noun.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase serving as sentence subject.
Fused form of clitic negator ‘ne’ + copula ‘est’; auxiliary marking the start of the discontinuous negation ‘ne … pas’.
Adverb of negation; completes the discontinuous negation with ‘ne’.
Predicate adjective functioning as subject complement.

He has had a heart condition since birth.
She has a heart condition and is fragile.
My father doesn't have a heart condition.
